stemHtml: A Pilot has planned a flight leg from A to B, a distance of 175 NM, with a planned heading of 160°, and a planned groundspeed 150 kt in still air conditions. The actual time of departure is 14:15, and at 15:00 a fix is obtained 6 NM left off the planned track with 52 NM to go to B. What is the revised ETA and revised heading to reach B?
